nodes.label: prephase.py:run_prephase()
nodes.rationale: Reads /AGENTS.MD from VM, executes .schema + PRAGMA queries to build schema_digest (columns, FK, top product_properties keys with value type map). Also parses AGENTS.MD section index.

nodes.label: load_prompt(phase)
nodes.rationale: Reads data/prompts/{phase}.md. Phases: resolve, sql_plan, learn, answer. Guide block is always last in system message and marked cache_control: ephemeral.

nodes.label: run_pipeline
nodes.rationale: Main pipeline loop capped at 3 cycles. Runs SQL_PLAN -> SECURITY CHECK -> VALIDATE -> EXECUTE, with LEARN on failure and ANSWER on success. Security gates run before SQL execution so a blocked query is never executed.

nodes.label: resolve.py:run_resolve()
nodes.rationale: LLM generates discovery queries that must contain ILIKE or DISTINCT; executes them to confirm DB values before SQL planning. Returns confirmed_values: dict. DDL/DML blocked. Security-checked.

nodes.label: json_extract.py
nodes.rationale: 7-priority extraction. Mutation tools (write/delete) take priority over reads to avoid spurious tool calls — this ordering is load-bearing.

nodes.label: schema_gate.py:check_schema_compliance()
nodes.rationale: Checks unknown columns, unverified literals, double-key JOINs on product_properties. Must run after RESOLVE to have confirmed_values populated.

nodes.label: trace.py TraceLogger
nodes.rationale: Thread-local TraceLogger writes structured JSONL. Attach with set_trace(logger) before pipeline; read with get_trace() anywhere in call chain. Records: header, header_system (deduped by SHA-256), llm_call, gate_check, sql_validate, sql_execute, resolve_exec, task_result.

nodes.label: llm.py:call_llm_raw()
nodes.rationale: Provider prefix determines routing tier: anthropic/ -> Anthropic SDK; openrouter/ -> OpenRouter; ollama/ or bare name -> local Ollama. CC_ENABLED=1 -> cc_client.py subprocess (Claude Code tier). Transient errors retry with exponential backoff.

nodes.label: scripts/propose_optimizations.py
nodes.rationale: Synthesizers receive existing rules/prompts to prevent duplicate generation. _existing_* helpers must be preserved. All output channels require human review before activation — nothing activates automatically.

nodes.label: data/rules/*.yaml
nodes.rationale: Only rows with verified: true are loaded into the pipeline.

nodes.label: data/security/*.yaml
nodes.rationale: Security gates (regex pattern or named check); verified: true to activate. Run before SQL execution.

nodes.label: .eval_optimizations_processed
nodes.rationale: Tracks processed entries by SHA-256 hash of (channel|task_text|raw_rec) to prevent duplicate optimization generation across runs. In --dry-run mode, skipped entries are NOT added — preview is truly non-destructive.

nodes.label: LLM routing strategy
nodes.rationale: Provider prefix in MODEL env var determines which SDK is used: anthropic/ -> Anthropic SDK (prompt caching via cache_control blocks), openrouter/ -> OpenRouter, ollama/ or bare name -> local Ollama.

nodes.label: optimization output channels
nodes.rationale: Three channels: rule_optimization -> data/rules/sql-NNN.yaml, security_optimization -> data/security/sec-NNN.yaml, prompt_optimization -> data/prompts/optimized/. All require human review (verified: true or manual copy) before activation.

nodes.label: pipeline execution phases
nodes.rationale: Phase order per cycle (up to 3): RESOLVE -> SQL_PLAN -> AGENTS.MD refs check -> SECURITY -> SCHEMA -> VALIDATE -> EXECUTE -> ANSWER. On any failure: LEARN phase (_run_learn) extracts a rule (keeps last 3 session rules) and retries.

nodes.label: HarnessService
nodes.rationale: 7 RPCs: GetBenchmark, StartRun, StartTrial, EndTrial, SubmitRun, StartPlayground, Status. Used by main.py via HarnessServiceClientSync.

nodes.label: EcomRuntime
nodes.rationale: 11 RPCs exposing virtual ecommerce-OS filesystem. Read: Context, Read, List, Tree, Find, Search, Stat. Write: Write, Delete. Exec: restricted to deterministic in-runtime tools like /bin/sql. Completion: Answer(message, outcome, refs). Supports SHA-256 preconditions on writes and audit trail.

nodes.label: PcmRuntime (legacy)
nodes.rationale: Older flat interface. 10 RPCs. No SHA-256 preconditions, no audit trail, no Stat. Write supports line-range patching. Has MkDir and Move (ECOM does not).

nodes.label: buf CLI
nodes.rationale: Required to regenerate protobuf stubs. Run via 'make proto' from project root. Never edit bitgn/ directly.

nodes.label: adding a new optimization channel
nodes.rationale: Requires: synthesizer function _synthesize_<channel>(), writer function _write_<channel>(), loop block in main(), and unique dedup hash channel string differing from 'rule', 'security', 'prompt'.

nodes.label: Answer.outcome values
nodes.rationale: Agent sends: OUTCOME_OK (success), OUTCOME_DENIED_SECURITY (injection/scope violation), OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION (ambiguous task), OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED (tool not available), OUTCOME_ERR_INTERNAL (agent crash).

nodes.label: Create run dir, open main.log for stats, wrap stdout for [task_id] terminal pref
nodes.norm_label: create run dir, open main.log for stats, wrap stdout for [task_id] terminal pref

nodes.label: Deprecated shim — kept for test backward compat. Use _all_values.
nodes.norm_label: deprecated shim — kept for test backward compat. use _all_values.

nodes.label: Resolve identifiers in task_text against DB. Returns confirmed_values or {} on f
nodes.norm_label: resolve identifiers in task_text against db. returns confirmed_values or {} on f

nodes.label: SGR LLM call: returns (parsed_output_or_None, sgr_trace_entry, tok_info).
nodes.norm_label: sgr llm call: returns (parsed_output_or_none, sgr_trace_entry, tok_info).

nodes.label: Update confirmed_values in-place from DISTINCT query results.
nodes.norm_label: update confirmed_values in-place from distinct query results.

nodes.label: Extract catalogue paths from SQL results. Uses 'path' column when present,     f
nodes.norm_label: extract catalogue paths from sql results. uses 'path' column when present,     f

nodes.label: Phase-based SQL pipeline. Returns (stats dict, eval Thread or None).
nodes.norm_label: phase-based sql pipeline. returns (stats dict, eval thread or none).

nodes.label: Evaluator thread starts even when all cycles fail.
nodes.norm_label: evaluator thread starts even when all cycles fail.

nodes.label: When AnswerOutput.model_validate fails (invalid outcome), vm.answer is still cal
nodes.norm_label: when answeroutput.model_validate fails (invalid outcome), vm.answer is still cal

nodes.label: Schema query (non-DISTINCT) mixed with DISTINCT batch → discovery-only fires if
nodes.norm_label: schema query (non-distinct) mixed with distinct batch → discovery-only fires if

nodes.label: When discovery returns 3XL, L, XL, XXL — all four must be in confirmed_values.
nodes.norm_label: when discovery returns 3xl, l, xl, xxl — all four must be in confirmed_values.

nodes.label: main.log must contain stats rows but NOT pipeline cycle lines.
nodes.norm_label: main.log must contain stats rows but not pipeline cycle lines.

nodes.label: Raw hierarchical paths stored verbatim in sku_refs.
nodes.norm_label: raw hierarchical paths stored verbatim in sku_refs.

nodes.label: AUTO_REFS block shows short-form refs regardless of raw path depth.
nodes.norm_label: auto_refs block shows short-form refs regardless of raw path depth.

nodes.label: clean_refs accepts model output in any format, outputs short-form.
nodes.norm_label: clean_refs accepts model output in any format, outputs short-form.

nodes.label: Cluster semantically equivalent recs into representatives via one LLM call.
nodes.norm_label: cluster semantically equivalent recs into representatives via one llm call.

nodes.label: Returns None if no conflict, or 'CONFLICT: <id> — <reason>' string.
nodes.norm_label: returns none if no conflict, or 'conflict: <id> — <reason>' string.
